name: Reaction Zoom
description: Zoom in on reaction to product result
camera_block: starts wide then smoothly zooms to face during reaction, steady zoom not shaky, progressively closer to face, smooth zoom progression over 2-3 seconds
motion_block: clearly visible reaction expression with wide surprised delighted eyes, natural smile or gasp, subtle head tilt toward camera
performance_block: zoom syncs with reaction pacing, brief moment at peak reaction, build-up to dramatic moment, genuine surprise and delight, authentic emotional response
platform_block: authentic TikTok reaction shot, organic UGC pacing, not polished commercial
audio_block: subtle gasp or intake breath, excited reaction sounds
negative_prompt_block: no robotic zoom, no stiff reaction, no overproduced dramatic moment, no cinematic transition effects
